summary: Completed frontend testing of iyzico payment gateway criteria pages and logos. All 4 legal pages (Hakkımızda, Teslimat/İade, Gizlilik, Mesafeli Satış) load correctly with proper Turkish content. Footer displays Visa, MasterCard, and iyzico logos with correct data-testids. All footer legal links navigate to correct pages. Back-home links work on all legal pages.

minor_notes.issue: Mixed content warning: http://ip-api.com/json/ called from HTTPS page for country detection. Falls back to TR correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: iyzico payment gateway criteria pages are fully implemented. Key data-testids: about-page, delivery-return-page, privacy-page, distance-sales-page, back-home-link, visa-logo, mastercard-logo, iyzico-footer-logo, footer-delivery-link, footer-privacy-link, footer-distance-sales-link. Header has Hakkımızda link at nav a[href='/hakkimizda']. All legal pages have proper Turkish content with company info (Craponia Mücevherat ve Hediyelik Eşya), address, phone (+90 553 076 60 00), email (info@zikramatik.com). Privacy page includes KVKK references. iyzico logo served from /images/iyzico-footer-white.svg.

features_tested.hakkimizda_page: PASS - /hakkimizda loads with data-testid='about-page', company info, address, phone, email
features_tested.teslimat_iade_page: PASS - /teslimat-iade loads with data-testid='delivery-return-page', delivery and return policy content
features_tested.gizlilik_page: PASS - /gizlilik loads with data-testid='privacy-page', privacy policy with KVKK references
features_tested.mesafeli_satis_page: PASS - /mesafeli-satis loads with data-testid='distance-sales-page', distance sales agreement content
features_tested.visa_logo: PASS - Footer has Visa logo with data-testid='visa-logo'
features_tested.mastercard_logo: PASS - Footer has MasterCard logo with data-testid='mastercard-logo'
features_tested.iyzico_logo: PASS - Footer has iyzico logo with data-testid='iyzico-footer-logo', image loads correctly (456x32px)
features_tested.header_hakkimizda_link: PASS - Header navigation has Hakkımızda link pointing to /hakkimizda
features_tested.back_home_links: PASS - All legal pages have data-testid='back-home-link' that navigates to homepage

mocked_api_note: Payment (iyzico) and Email notifications are MOCKED as per previous iterations.
